PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q265538 ;(wdt:P121 | wdt:P122) wd:Q334634 ; wdt:P585 ?year .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
